title: Message Envelope
description: Common wrapper for every message on the C-UAS C2 bus. The payload is one canonical type, discriminated by messageType. Government-owned interface (Imperative 2).

messageId.description: Globally unique id; also used for replay/dedup detection.

schemaVersion.description: SemVer of the interface contract this message conforms to. Consumers route/validate by version.

nodeId.description: Identity of the publishing component (Zero Trust principal).

classification.description: Security marking enforced end to end (banner, ACLs, cross-domain guards).

timeCreated.description: RFC3339 creation time at the source.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical message bytes (Zero Trust). Optional in the reference scaffold; required in production.
